zh.West Chevington, Morpeth, Northumberland: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓
zh.Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Morwick, Warkworth, Northumberland, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫維其可
zh.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Ernulf de Morewick的兒子，於1155年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫維其可。他於大約1185年與Aline De Bertram在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他在英國波藍德被列為sheriff。他去世於1191年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Ernulf de Morewick的儿子，于1155年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫維其可。他于大约1185年与Aline De Bertram在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他在英国波藍德被列为sheriff。他去世于1191年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick was born in 1155, in Morwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the son of Ernulf de Morewick. He married Aline De Bertram about 1185, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Cumberland, England. He died in 1191, in West Chevington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick est né en 1155, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils d’Ernulf de Morewick. Il a épousé Aline De Bertram environ 1185, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Cumberland, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1191, à West Chevington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

Er hat um 1185 in Northumberland, England Aline De Bertram geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Cumberland, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 36 Jahren in West Chevington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewickは1155年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックでErnulf de Morewickの息子として生まれた。約1185年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでAline De Bertramと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。イギリスクウンバーランドでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1191年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウエスト チェヴィントンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick(은)는 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 Ernulf de Morewick의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1185년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Aline De Bertram(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1191년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 웨스트 처빙턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick nasceu em 1155, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Ernulf de Morewick. Ele casou-se com Aline De Bertram aproximadamente 1185, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1191, em West Chevington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ro.West Chevington, Morpeth, Northumberland: West Chevington, Northumberland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick родился в 1155 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Ernulf de Morewick. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline De Bertram около 1185 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности кумбирланд, Англия. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности вест чевингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
